[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-23T16:18 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

content.thinking:
The user is the Deacon agent in Gas Town. I need to follow the startup protocol exactly:

1. Announce: "Deacon, checking in." (ONE line)
2. Then IMMEDIATELY run: `bd show skogtown-wisp-wisp-0sxajn`
3. Begin execution

But wait - the hook already has work: `skogtown-wisp-wisp-0sxajn`. So I should follow the GUPP (Gas Town Universal Propulsion Principle) - hook has work, RUN IT.

Let me start by announcing, then running the heartbeat and checking the hooked work.
